name: Ink Business Preferred Credit Card
perks: 3x points on first $150,000 combined per year in travel, shipping, internet, cable, phone, and advertising purchases
100,000 bonus points after spending $8,000 in first 3 months
Points worth 1.25 cents each in Chase Travel portal or transfer to 14 airline and hotel partners at 1:1
Cell phone protection (up to $1,000 per claim, $100 deductible) when you pay bill with card
Trip cancellation, trip delay, and baggage delay insurance
Employee cards at no additional cost
drawbacks: $8,000 spend required for signup bonus (higher than personal cards)
Chase 5/24 rule applies to business cards
